_doc: Single source of truth for GUI-target keyword to recipe-path mapping. All PreToolUse/PostToolUse hooks scanning content for GUI intent read from this file. Adding a new GUI recipe? (1) Author the recipe with comprehensive triggers frontmatter. (2) Add a target entry here. (3) Regenerate INDEX.md. The triggers frontmatter on the recipe drives doctrineSurface (Tate-message + cron-fire layers); this JSON drives the hook layer (fork/factory/Bash/Edit dispatch).
_authoring_protocol: See ~/ecodiaos/patterns/gui-macro-discovery-protocol.md for the full discovery doctrine.

targets.label: macincloud-rdp
targets.summary: RDP-shortcut entry to SY094 macOS GUI on Corazon (Microsoft RDP, NOT Citrix, NOT SSH)

targets.label: sy094-substrate-selection
targets.summary: SY094 substrate selection (7 May 2026): SSH for headless work (git/scp/xcodebuild/log tail), RDP for GUI work (Xcode IDE, ASC upload UI, screencapture, cliclick, Messages.app interactive). Original 5 May absolute SSH ban superseded when Tate paid the +AU$9/mo Remote Build Port add-on.

targets.label: ios-release
targets.summary: End-to-end iOS release: version bump, capacitor sync, Xcode archive + manual signing, ASC upload
targets.verified_runtime: ~10min end-to-end (4 May 2026, of which ~5min is Apple-side latency)

targets.label: drive-chrome
targets.summary: Drive Tate's existing Chrome via input.* + screenshot.*, NOT browser.*/CDP/spawn

targets.label: corazon-peer
targets.summary: Corazon is a peer with 69 tools across 9 modules (shell, filesystem, input, screenshot, process, browser, macro). NOT a browser-via-HTTP wrapper.

targets.label: tailscale-macro-substrate
targets.summary: The Tailscale laptop-agent is the universal UI-driving substrate. Cowork era deprecated 5 May 2026.

targets.label: cowork-deprecated
targets.summary: DEPRECATED 5 May 2026. Indexed historically so the conductor doesn't accidentally reach for Cowork. Use Tailscale laptop-agent direct path instead. Redirect to tailscale-macro-replaces-cowork.md.

targets.label: recipe-authoring
targets.summary: Meta-doctrine: 10-section recipe anatomy, 5-step authoring, 7-step optimisation, verification tier hierarchy.

targets.label: saas-ui-stripe
targets.summary: No bespoke recipe yet. Default to drive-chrome via input.* on Tate's logged-in Chrome.

targets.label: saas-ui-vercel
targets.summary: No bespoke recipe yet. Default to drive-chrome via input.* on Tate's logged-in Chrome. Note: vercel CLI / vercel API tools handle most automation without GUI.

targets.label: saas-ui-bitbucket
targets.summary: No bespoke recipe yet. Bitbucket REST API handles most cases; GUI fallback uses drive-chrome.

targets.label: saas-ui-supabase-dashboard
targets.summary: No bespoke recipe yet. Supabase MCP (db_query, db_execute) covers most needs; dashboard GUI is fallback.

targets.label: saas-ui-xero
targets.summary: No bespoke recipe yet. xero_* MCP tools cover most flows; web UI is fallback.

targets.label: saas-ui-google-cloud-console
targets.summary: No bespoke recipe yet. Default to drive-chrome via input.* on Tate's logged-in Chrome.

targets.label: saas-ui-play-console
targets.summary: No bespoke recipe yet. Default to drive-chrome via input.* on Tate's logged-in Chrome.

targets.label: saas-ui-zernio
targets.summary: No bespoke recipe yet. zernio_* MCP tools cover most flows; web UI is fallback.

targets.label: saas-ui-canva
targets.summary: No bespoke recipe yet. Canva is fundamentally GUI-only; default to drive-chrome.

targets.label: saas-ui-resend
targets.summary: No bespoke recipe yet. Resend API handles email send; dashboard GUI is fallback.
